summary: Comprehensive testing of API Key Management UI in Admin Settings page (/admin/settings). All 8 features tested and verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Created test API key 'TEST_ProcureWay_1771008619' which was then revoked during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: API Key Management UI in Admin Settings fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/api-keys/generate, GET /api/admin/api-keys, DELETE /api/admin/api-keys/{key_id}. All endpoints require admin role authentication.

api_keys_tab_visible.details: Tab with data-testid='tab-api-keys' visible and clickable, shows correct count badge

api_keys_table.details: Table displays with all headers: Name, Key (masked), Created, Last Used, Status, Actions(Revoke)

generate_api_key_button.details: Button with data-testid='generate-api-key-btn' visible and opens modal

generate_modal.details: Modal opens with Key Name input (data-testid='api-key-name-input') and Generate Key button (data-testid='confirm-generate-api-key-btn')

key_generation.details: Entering name and clicking Generate Key creates new key with format 'oll_sk_...' and shows success toast

key_display_with_warning.details: After generation, full key displayed in input (data-testid='generated-api-key-value') with yellow warning: 'Copy this key now! You won't be able to see it again.'

copy_button.details: Copy button (data-testid='copy-generated-api-key-btn') visible and clickable. Note: clipboard write permission error in headless browser (expected)

done_button.details: Done button (data-testid='done-api-key-btn') closes modal and new key appears in list

key_in_list_after_create.details: New key appears in table with masked key value, Created date, Never for Last Used, Active status, and Revoke button

revoke_button.details: Revoke button (data-testid='revoke-api-key-{id}') opens confirm dialog, clicking OK deletes key and shows success toast
